broccoli.title: Classic Scrambled Eggs with Tomato
broccoli.description: Simple to make, nutritious and delicious
broccoli.directions: 1. Beat and scramble eggs, set aside 2. Stir-fry tomatoes until soft 3. Add eggs and mix 4. Season and serve

broccoli.title: Green Pepper and Pork Stir-fry
broccoli.description: Classic home-cooked dish, perfect with rice
broccoli.ingredients: 200g pork, 3 green peppers, soy sauce, cooking wine, starch, oil, salt
broccoli.directions: 1. Marinate pork strips 2. Slice green peppers 3. Stir-fry pork then peppers 4. Combine and mix well

broccoli.title: Kung Pao Chicken
broccoli.ingredients: 300g chicken breast, peanuts, dried chilies, soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, cornstarch
broccoli.directions: 1. Dice chicken and marinate 2. Toast peanuts 3. Stir-fry chicken with chilies 4. Add sauce and peanuts

broccoli.title: Mapo Tofu
broccoli.ingredients: 1 block tofu, 100g ground pork, doubanjiang, Sichuan peppercorns, garlic, scallions
broccoli.directions: 1. Cut tofu into cubes 2. Brown ground pork 3. Add doubanjiang and aromatics 4. Simmer with tofu

broccoli.title: Sweet and Sour Pork
broccoli.ingredients: 400g pork loin, bell peppers, pineapple, vinegar, ketchup, sugar, cornstarch
broccoli.directions: 1. Cut and coat pork, deep fry 2. Prepare sweet and sour sauce 3. Stir-fry vegetables 4. Combine all with sauce

broccoli.title: Garlic Bok Choy
broccoli.ingredients: 300g bok choy, 4 cloves garlic, oyster sauce, oil, salt
broccoli.directions: 1. Blanch bok choy briefly 2. Sauté minced garlic 3. Add bok choy and stir-fry 4. Season with oyster sauce

broccoli.title: Mango Sago Pudding
broccoli.ingredients: 2 mangoes, 50g sago pearls, 200ml coconut milk, 100ml milk, sugar
broccoli.directions: 1. Cook sago and rinse with cold water 2. Dice mangoes 3. Mix coconut milk and milk 4. Combine all ingredients

broccoli.title: Red Bean Soup
broccoli.ingredients: 200g red beans, rock sugar, dried tangerine peel, water
broccoli.directions: 1. Soak red beans overnight 2. Boil with tangerine peel 3. Simmer until beans are soft 4. Add rock sugar to taste

broccoli.title: Egg Tarts
broccoli.description: Flaky pastry with creamy custard filling
broccoli.ingredients: Puff pastry, 3 eggs, 150ml milk, 80g sugar, vanilla extract
broccoli.directions: 1. Line muffin tin with pastry 2. Whisk eggs, milk, and sugar 3. Pour into shells 4. Bake at 200°C for 20 mins

broccoli.title: Black Sesame Soup
broccoli.ingredients: 100g black sesame seeds, 50g rice, rock sugar, water
broccoli.directions: 1. Toast sesame seeds and rice 2. Grind into fine powder 3. Simmer with water 4. Add sugar and stir until thick

broccoli.title: Tangyuan (Sweet Rice Balls)
broccoli.description: Chewy glutinous rice balls with sweet filling
broccoli.ingredients: 200g glutinous rice flour, black sesame paste, sugar, warm water
broccoli.directions: 1. Mix flour with water to form dough 2. Wrap sesame filling 3. Boil in water until they float 4. Serve in sweet broth

broccoli.title: Panna Cotta with Lychee
broccoli.description: Creamy Italian dessert with Asian twist
broccoli.ingredients: 300ml heavy cream, 100ml milk, 40g sugar, gelatin, lychees, rose water
broccoli.directions: 1. Heat cream, milk, and sugar 2. Dissolve gelatin 3. Pour into molds 4. Chill and top with lychees

broccoli.title: Steamed Egg Custard
broccoli.description: Silky smooth and nutritious, suitable for all ages
broccoli.ingredients: 2 eggs, warm water, salt, oil, scallions
broccoli.directions: 1. Beat eggs with warm water 2. Skim off foam 3. Steam for 8 minutes 4. Season with oil and scallions

broccoli.title: Stir-fried Broccoli
broccoli.description: Light and healthy, rich in vitamin C
broccoli.directions: 1. Blanch broccoli 2. Sauté garlic until fragrant 3. Add broccoli and stir-fry 4. Season and serve

broccoli.title: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
broccoli.ingredients: 150g quinoa, chickpeas, avocado, cherry tomatoes, spinach, lemon tahini dressing
broccoli.directions: 1. Cook quinoa according to package 2. Roast chickpeas 3. Prepare vegetables 4. Assemble bowl and drizzle dressing

broccoli.title: Miso Soup with Tofu
broccoli.ingredients: 2 tbsp miso paste, 200g silken tofu, wakame seaweed, dashi stock, scallions
broccoli.directions: 1. Heat dashi stock 2. Add tofu cubes and seaweed 3. Dissolve miso paste 4. Garnish with scallions

broccoli.title: Grilled Salmon with Asparagus
broccoli.ingredients: 2 salmon fillets, 200g asparagus, lemon, olive oil, herbs, salt, pepper
broccoli.directions: 1. Season salmon with herbs 2. Grill salmon 4-5 mins per side 3. Roast asparagus 4. Serve with lemon

broccoli.title: Zucchini Noodles with Pesto
broccoli.ingredients: 3 zucchinis, basil pesto, cherry tomatoes, parmesan, pine nuts
broccoli.directions: 1. Spiralize zucchini into noodles 2. Lightly sauté zoodles 3. Toss with pesto 4. Top with tomatoes and cheese

broccoli.title: Overnight Oats with Berries
broccoli.ingredients: 50g rolled oats, 150ml almond milk, chia seeds, mixed berries, honey, yogurt
broccoli.directions: 1. Mix oats, milk, and chia seeds 2. Refrigerate overnight 3. Top with berries and yogurt 4. Drizzle with honey

tasks.title: Organize closet
tasks.notes: Sort clothes by season and donate items not worn in past year

tasks.notes: Check soil moisture first, especially the ferns and succulents

tasks.notes: Remove expired items, wipe shelves, organize by food category

tasks.title: Pay bills

tasks.title: Buy birthday gift

tasks.title: Make budget

tasks.title: Backup computer files
tasks.notes: Include documents, photos, and project files to external drive

tasks.title: Read new book
tasks.notes: Start 'Atomic Habits', aim for at least one chapter per day

tasks.title: Learn to cook new dish
tasks.notes: Try Thai green curry recipe, gather ingredients beforehand

tasks.title: Plan travel route
tasks.notes: Research attractions, book hotels, and check visa requirements

tasks.title: Take dog to vet
tasks.notes: Annual checkup and vaccination, bring previous medical records

tasks.title: Update resume
tasks.notes: Add recent projects and certifications, tailor for job applications

markor.name: recipe_homemade_pizza.md
markor.content:
# 自制披萨食谱

## 材料
- 高筋面粉 300g
- 温水 200ml
- 酵母 5g
- 盐 5g
- 橄榄油 15ml
- 番茄酱 适量
- 芝士 200g
- 配菜: 蘑菇、青椒、洋葱

## 步骤
1. 酵母用温水化开，加入面粉、盐、橄榄油揉成面团
2. 发酵1小时至两倍大小
3. 擀成饼状，涂抹番茄酱
4. 撒上芝士和配菜
5. 烤箱220度烤15-20分钟

## 第三天: 迪谷与原宿

- 下午: 原宿竹下通，明治神宫

## 第四天: 上野与秋叶原

- 下午: 东京国立博物馆
- 晚上: 秋叶原电器街

## 第五天: 返程
- 上午: 购买土产
- 下午: 返程

markor.name: workout_routine_january.md
markor.content:
# 一月份健身计划

## 周一：胸肌 + 三头肌
- 卧 bench press: 4组 x 8-10次
- 哑铃飞鸟: 3组 x 12次
- 俯卧撑: 3组 x 15次
- 窄距俯卧撑: 3组 x 10次
- 绳索下压: 3组 x 12次

## 周三：背肌 + 二头肌
- 引引体向上: 4组 x 8次
- 哑铃划船: 3组 x 10次
- 杠铃弯举: 3组 x 12次
- 锤式弯举: 3组 x 10次

## 周五：腿部 + 肩膀
- 深蹲: 4组 x 10次
- 腿举: 3组 x 12次
- 肩上推举: 3组 x 10次
- 侧平举: 3组 x 15次

markor.name: book_quotes_collection.md
markor.content:
# 书籍名言摘录

## 《活着》- 余华
> "人是为活着本身而活着，而不是为了活着之外的任何事物所活着。"

## 《人类简史》- 尤瓦尔·赫拉利
> "快乐不在于客观成就，而在于主观期望。"

## 《1984》- 乔治·奥威尔
> "谁控制过去就控制未来；谁控制现在就控制过去。"

## 《三体》- 刘慈欣
> "弱小和无知不是生存的障碍，傲慢才是。"

## 《百年孤独》- 加西亚·马尔克斯
> "生命中真正重要的不是你遭遇了什么，而是你记住了哪些事，又是如何铭记的。"

ankidroid-2_14.back: 深度学习是机器学习的一个分支，使用多层神经网络来学习数据的表示
CNN是一种专门用于处理网格状数据（如图像）的深度学习模型
RNN是一种能够处理序列数据的神经网络，具有记忆功能
Transformer是基于自注意力机制的深度学习模型，是现代NLP的基础架构
BERT(Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers)是Google开发的预训练语言模型
GPT(Generative Pre-trained Transformer)是OpenAI开发的自回归语言模型
强化学习是通过与环境交互，通过奖励信号来学习最优策略的机器学习方法
梯度下降是一种优化算法，通过沿着损失函数梯度的反方向更新参数来最小化损失
过拟合是指模型在训练数据上表现很好，但在新数据上表现较差的现象
ankidroid-2_14.tags: 机器学习 模型评估

ankidroid-2_14.back: 正则化是防止过拟合的技术，通过在损失函数中添加惩罚项来约束模型复杂度
反向传播是训练神经网络的核心算法，通过链式法则计算梯度
激活函数为神经网络引入非线性，常见的有ReLU、Sigmoid、Tanh
批归一化通过标准化层输入来加速训练并提高模型稳定性
Dropout是一种正则化技术，训练时随机丢弃神经元以防止过拟合
迁移学习是将在一个任务上学到的知识应用到另一个相关任务上
